answer: Booth, illuminated, vibrant, red, illuminated, welcoming, glowing. The feeling of community is palpable, especially during the late-night hours when the lights illuminate the pathways. The energy is palpable as people gather, sharing stories and experiences under the watchful gaze of the glowing signs.
